completed_tasks.name: Stage 1 — Read/Inspect endpoints
completed_tasks.summary: /screen, /info, /focused, /click, /input, /setText implemented. GhostCoreAccessibilityService.takeScreenshot, AccessibilityClicker, AccessibilityTyper.setTextOnNode, StateCoordinator additions, LocalApiServer routes, docs/API.md updated.

completed_tasks.name: Stage 2 — Gestures + Global Actions
completed_tasks.summary: /scroll, /longpress, /gesture, /back, /home, /recents implemented. GhostAccessibilityExecutionCore.GestureStroke/GesturePoint types, AccessibilityScroller, performLongPressGesture, performGesture, doGlobalAction on both services. Key fix: performGlobalAction is final on AccessibilityService — called via when(service) cast in StateCoordinator.

completed_tasks.name: Stage 3 — Sensing/Utility
completed_tasks.summary: All 4 Stage 3 endpoints implemented and build successfully.

decisions.decision: performGlobalAction is final on AccessibilityService — cannot be in GhostAccessibilityExecutionCore interface
decisions.rationale: Android AccessibilityService.performGlobalAction is a final framework method. Cannot override in interface. Solved with doGlobalAction() method on concrete services called via when(service) cast in StateCoordinator.

decisions.decision: GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK/HOME/RECENTS routed via single buildGlobalActionResponse with actionCode parameter
decisions.rationale: Avoids code duplication. All three share the same response logic.

decisions.decision: GestureStroke/GesturePoint are data classes in GhostAccessibilityExecutionCore.kt
decisions.rationale: Shared types needed by both services and StateCoordinator. Kept in the core interface file.

decisions.decision: /notify uses NotificationManager for post/cancel, NOT NotificationListenerService interception
decisions.rationale: NotificationManager works without user enabling notification access; GhostNotificationService is a stub for future interception capabilities.

decisions.decision: MediaProjection stored in StateCoordinator via MediaProjectionProvider, accessed from Activity via GhosthandServiceRegistry
decisions.rationale: Activity holds MediaProjectionManager and consent flow; stores projection in service registry; service delegates to StateCoordinator. Avoids companion visibility issues.

decisions.decision: Display densityDpi read from context.resources.displayMetrics not Display.densityDpi
decisions.rationale: Display.densityDpi not accessible on all API levels; context.resources.displayMetrics.densityDpi works universally.

next_action: Phase 09 is complete. All 19 endpoints implemented. Next: commit Stage 3 changes, update STATE.md, update docs/API.md sections 7.28-7.31.
context_notes: Phase 09 capability-parity is now fully implemented. 19 endpoints across 3 stages. Build is clean. Stage 3 introduced new providers (ClipboardProvider, MediaProjectionProvider, NotificationDispatcher, GhostNotificationService) and new Android permissions (FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MEDIA_PROJECTION, POST_NOTIFICATIONS). docs/API.md needs sections 7.28-7.31. All work is uncommitted.
